title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team analyzed protein binding sites to narrow 15,000 candidates to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation, demonstrating how AI tools enable research capacity in resource-limited settings.
